EventManagementData.title: Reclaim Memories
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta's a reference book. That's why writing recipes into her might bring back her memories. I need to think up recipes, then Synthesize them and write them into Plachta.

EventManagementData.title: Reclaim More Memories
EventManagementData.desc: It looks like writing recipes into Plachta gradually restores her memories. I need to write all kinds of things into her to help her out.

EventManagementData.title: Reclaim Even More Memories
EventManagementData.desc: With her memories returning, I'm learning a lot more about Plachta. I didn't think she was a human girl... I need to keep it up and bring back more of her memories!

EventManagementData.title: Reclaim Memories Again
EventManagementData.desc: I transferred Plachta's soul into the doll, so more memories should come back now... I think! Let's try coming up with new recipes and Synthesizing more stuff!

EventManagementData.title: Reclaim Lots of Memories
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta's memories are returning again, so I need to work even harder now. I'll study lots of alchemy, for Plachta's sake too!

EventManagementData.title: Find Out Where Luard Went
EventManagementData.desc: It sounds like the fastest way of finding Luard will be to bring back Plachta's memories. It's hard to stay calm now, but... I should continue my alchemy at a steady pace.

EventManagementData.title: Study Alchemy.
EventManagementData.desc: I need to get even better at alchemy for Plachta's sake. It seems like daily life activities can give me ideas and insight... I should try doing all kinds of things.

EventManagementData.title: Continue Studying Alchemy.
EventManagementData.desc: I brought back Plachta's memories, but my skills still have a long way to go. I need to try all kinds of things from now on too, and get even better at alchemy!

EventManagementData.title: Search for the "Cauldron of Knowledge" 1
EventManagementData.desc: The "Cauldron of Knowledge"... A dream-like device that lets anyone use really amazing alchemy. If I had that, even I could... Well, I'll gather information where I can for now.

EventManagementData.title: Help Out Monika 1
EventManagementData.desc: Monika asked me to make some "Berg Medicine". That's easy... Or so I'd like to say, but I'm not too confident about it. I should look for grandma's book.

EventManagementData.title: Help Out Monika 2
EventManagementData.desc: Looking through grandma's books reminded me how to make the "Berg Medicine". Yeah, I should try Synthesizing it!

EventManagementData.title: Learn Alchemy from Plachta 1
EventManagementData.desc: It sounds like Plachta's going to be teaching me alchemy. I was teaching myself all this time, so I'm happy to have a teacher. Alright, I'll have her teach me lots of things!

EventManagementData.title: Learn Alchemy from Plachta 1
EventManagementData.desc: I wanted Plachta to teach me alchemy, but I don't have any materials left in the atelier... I need to go gather some outside.

EventManagementData.title: Learn Alchemy from Plachta 2
EventManagementData.desc: I gathered materials, so now I can have Plachta teach me Synthesis. Hehehe, time to learn lots of things!

EventManagementData.title: Go Gather Materials 1
EventManagementData.desc: I need to go outside to gather materials. But scary monsters appear out there. I'm uneasy about it, so I'll ask Monika to come with me. She's probably in the "Plaza"...

EventManagementData.title: Go Gather Materials 2
EventManagementData.desc: I invited Monika, and I have snacks... Time to go gathering outside the town! ...Oh right, Puni can appear out there, so I should probably bring things like bombs and medicine...

EventManagementData.title: Go Gather Materials 3
EventManagementData.desc: I was a little surprised to run into Oskar, but now he can help with gathering too. It'll be over in no time if we all work together.

EventManagementData.title: Go Gather Materials 4
EventManagementData.desc: I'm glad I found lots of materials. This is thanks to Monika and Oskar. I want to thank them properly, and my basket is heavy... We should go back to the atelier.

EventManagementData.title: Listen to Oskar's Request 1
EventManagementData.desc: Oskar asked me to help slay a monster that appeared at the "Forgotten Nursery". I'm not very good at fighting, but... He's my friend, I guess I need to help.

EventManagementData.title: Listen to Oskar's Request 2
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta has a bad feeling. We should hurry to the Cauldron of Knowledge.

EventManagementData.title: Listen to the Two's Request
EventManagementData.desc: Meklet and Atomina asked me to Synthesize an item. Those two are a little strange, but... Since they're relying on me, I can't let them down!

EventManagementData.title: Investigate the Creepy Cabin 1
EventManagementData.desc: They say at night, people hear strange voices from a cabin that should be empty... Could it be a ghost... Uu, I accepted the request, so I need to go check...

EventManagementData.title: Investigate the Creepy Cabin 2
EventManagementData.desc: The voice from the cabin turned out to be a doll maker named Fritz. I need to go report this to Mr. Horst... I'm really glad it wasn't a ghost.

EventManagementData.title: Continue Studying Alchemy.
EventManagementData.desc: I feel like I've gotten pretty good at alchemy. But there's still lots of stuff that I don't know. I should talk to lots of people, and go to all kinds of places... And study alchemy more.

EventManagementData.title: Find Clues for Memories 1
EventManagementData.desc: Lately, Plachta isn't getting any memories back... I can't figure this out alone, so I should go talk to some people who might know more about this kind of thing.

EventManagementData.title: Find Clues for Memories 2
EventManagementData.desc: *Sigh*, I couldn't find many clues for getting Plachta's memories to come back... I'll just go back to the atelier for now...

EventManagementData.title: Operation Humanize Plachta! 1
EventManagementData.desc: If I turn Plachta back into a human, she might get her memories back too! I need to find a way to do that. It may be best to talk to all kinds of people again.

EventManagementData.title: Operation Humanize Plachta! 2
EventManagementData.desc: Uu, I made Plachta mad... It looks like I won't go anywhere just doing random things, maybe I should calm down and think it over again...

EventManagementData.title: Operation Humanize Plachta! 3
EventManagementData.desc: Uuuuu, I'm completely out of ideas... I can't figure out any way to make Plachta human again, maybe I'll take a walk to lighten my mood...

EventManagementData.title: Operation Humanize Plachta! 4
EventManagementData.desc: Fritz gave me a great idea! This should... No, it WILL work! I should hurry back to the atelier!

EventManagementData.title: Turn Plachta into a Doll 1
EventManagementData.desc: Turning Plachta into a doll should help bring back her memories! To do that, I need to collect a bunch of necessary items.

EventManagementData.title: Turn Plachta into a Doll 2
EventManagementData.desc: I collected the items to turn Plachta into a doll... Okay. I need to use the "Compass of Hades" to move Plachta's soul into the doll...!

EventManagementData.title: Make Plachta's Body 1
EventManagementData.desc: I need to make a doll for Plachta's body. There's only one person who knows a lot about dolls... That's Fritz! I should go talk to him.

EventManagementData.title: Make Plachta's Body 2
EventManagementData.desc: Fritz was really enthusiastic about creating the blueprints for Plachta's body. I need to wait for him to finish.

EventManagementData.title: Make Plachta's Body 3
EventManagementData.desc: Apparently we need really strong materials for Plachta's body. I need to Synthesize the item Fritz requested, then bring it to his house in Old Town.

EventManagementData.title: Make Plachta's Body 4
EventManagementData.desc: I delivered the materials, so all that's left is to wait for Fritz to finish! I wonder how Plachta's body will turn out...

EventManagementData.title: Make Plachta's Clothes 1
EventManagementData.desc: I can't leave Plachta naked. That's why I need to make clothes for her... Leon is definitely the best choice when it comes to clothes!

EventManagementData.title: Make Plachta's Clothes 2
EventManagementData.desc: Since we don't know the exact size Plachta's body will be, I need to make cloth that's really elastic for her clothes. I should Synthesize it and deliver it to Leon.

EventManagementData.title: Make Plachta's Clothes 3
EventManagementData.desc: I gave her the materials, so now I'll leave the rest to Leon! I just need to wait for her to bring Plachta's clothes.

EventManagementData.title: Make Plachta's Power Core 1
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta's body needs a power source to move. That reminds me, I saw Harol working on wind-up springs before at his shop... I should try talking to him.

EventManagementData.title: Make Plachta's Power Core 2
EventManagementData.desc: Harol outright refused to work on Plachta's springs... But there's no one else who could do it... Okay, I need to go ask him one more time!

EventManagementData.title: Make Plachta's Power Core 3
EventManagementData.desc: Harol agreed to work on the springs. It should be fine, but I should hurry and deliver the materials in case he changes his mind.

EventManagementData.title: Make Plachta's Power Core 4
EventManagementData.desc: I gave Harol the materials for the springs. He said he'll deliver it to the atelier when he's done, so I just need to wait!

EventManagementData.title: Make a Tool to Move Souls 1
EventManagementData.desc: I need to make a tool to move Plachta's soul from the book into the doll. Who would know about this... Oh right, Sir Julio's been investigating a lot about alchemy...!

EventManagementData.title: Make a Tool to Move Souls 2
EventManagementData.desc: Sir Julio gave me a recipe to make an item relating to souls. I should check it out now!

EventManagementData.title: Make a Tool to Move Souls 3
EventManagementData.desc: The recipe from Sir Julio talked about a material called a "Soul Stone", but I've never heard of it... It's a stone, so maybe I should ask Logy about it...

EventManagementData.title: Make a Tool to Move Souls 4
EventManagementData.desc: Logy said that the "Soul Stone" can be found at set intervals at the "Prospector's Strand". I don't know if it'll be there, but it's worth going there to check...!

EventManagementData.title: Make a Tool to Move Souls 5
EventManagementData.desc: I managed to obtain a "Soul Stone"... Now I can Synthesize the item Sir Julio told me about, the "Spirit Needle"!

EventManagementData.title: Make a Tool to Move Souls 6
EventManagementData.desc: I know how to make a device to move Plachta's soul, but I don't have enough "Spirit Needles"... Oh right, Cory specializes in duplicating items.

EventManagementData.title: Make a Tool to Move Souls 7
EventManagementData.desc: Cory said she'd do it for free, but I'd feel bad for asking too much from her. Instead, I'll bring some milk that she requested.

EventManagementData.title: Make a Tool to Move Souls 8
EventManagementData.desc: I asked Cory to duplicate the "Spirit Needle". She should take her time, it would be a big problem if she was to shrink more.

EventManagementData.title: Make a Tool to Move Souls 9
EventManagementData.desc: Cory duplicated the "Spirit Needles" I need, so now I can make the tool to move Plachta's soul... Okay, I'll do my best to Synthesize it!

EventManagementData.title: Fulfill Promise with Plachta
EventManagementData.desc: I finally managed to move Plachta's soul into the doll. Now then, the first thing to do is... Fulfill the promise I made with Plachta! We're going to go have lots of fun!

EventManagementData.title: Take it Easy for a While
EventManagementData.desc: Ahh! That was really fun. I'm glad Plachta seemed to enjoy herself too... Anyway, maybe I'll take just a little break before I get back to my alchemy studies.

EventManagementData.title: Listen to Plachta's Request
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta asked me to Synthesize an item for her. I have no idea what it's used for, but she asked for it. I need to do my best to answer her.

EventManagementData.title: Solve Plachta's Concern 1
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta seems to be concerned about something. She wants to get even stronger for some reason. How to get stronger... I should think it over.

EventManagementData.title: Solve Plachta's Concern 2
EventManagementData.desc: Sounds like my special deluxe training program is no good... It's true that exercise wouldn't affect a doll's body... I should think about it more...

EventManagementData.title: Talk to Plachta
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta seems to have remembered something. She has something to tell me. I should go with her to the "Scar of the Land", as she asked.

EventManagementData.title: Accept Trial from Plachta
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta remembered where the "Cauldron of Knowledge" is! But it sounds like it requires a "key"... There's no way I'd refuse Plachta's test!

EventManagementData.title: Gather Materials for the "Key of Truth"
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta told me how to make the "Key of Truth", but it requires 3 materials. I've never heard of any of them, but I need to do my best to collect them...!

EventManagementData.title: Synthesize the "Key of Truth"
EventManagementData.desc: I collected all the materials thanks to Monika, Oskar, and Sir Julio. Now I'll finally have the "Cauldron of Knowledge"... I need to hurry up and Synthesize the "Key of Truth"!

EventManagementData.title: Look for "Haze Grass Petals" 1
EventManagementData.desc: One material to make the "Key of Truth" is "Haze Grass Petals". It sounds like a plant... Maybe Oskar would know about it?

EventManagementData.title: Look for "Haze Grass Petals" 2
EventManagementData.desc: Oskar just happened to be growing Haze Grass. But it won't bloom without lots of nutrients. I need to bring Oskar some fertilizer for the Haze Grass.

EventManagementData.title: Look for "Haze Grass Petals" 3
EventManagementData.desc: I gave Oskar the "Fertile Soil". He said the Haze Grass should bloom with it... I just have to wait a while.

EventManagementData.title: Look for "Sun Drops" 1
EventManagementData.desc: One material to make the "Key of Truth" is "Sun Drops". I have no idea what that is. Who would know about it... Maybe Monika?

EventManagementData.title: Look for "Sun Drops" 2
EventManagementData.desc: Monika said she heard about "Sun Drops" before, but... I can't help it if she doesn't remember. Hmm, what should I do...

EventManagementData.title: Look for "Sun Drops" 3
EventManagementData.desc: Monika gave me the recipe for "Sun Drops". It sounds like she did lots of research for me. Alright, I'll do my best to Synthesize it!

EventManagementData.title: Look for "Eternity Scales" 1
EventManagementData.desc: One material to make the "Key of Truth" is "Eternity Scales". They're scales, so maybe they would be dragon scales... Maybe Sir Julio would know about it?

EventManagementData.title: Look for "Eternity Scales" 2
EventManagementData.desc: It sounds like the "Eternity Scales" can be taken from "Dragonaire" in the "Scar of the Land". Sir Julio said it's really vicious, but... We should be okay if we're together!

EventManagementData.title: Go to the "Gates of Wisdom"
EventManagementData.desc: I made the "Key of Truth" and had Plachta release the seal. But it sounds like Plachta is worried about something. Let's hurry to the "Gates of Wisdom" deep in the "Enlightened Mountain"!

EventManagementData.title: Hurry into the "Gates of Wisdom"
EventManagementData.desc: The reason Plachta is worried is because Meklet and Atomina are trying to obtain the "Cauldron of Knowledge". We need to hurry inside!

EventManagementData.title: Talk About Luard
EventManagementData.desc: Meklet and Atomina took the "Cauldron of Knowledge"... And they combined into Luard... Uu, my head hurts from all this. I should talk to Plachta about it...

EventManagementData.title: Improve Your Alchemy Skills
EventManagementData.desc: We don't know where Luard went. It sounds like the fastest way to figure that out is to improve my alchemy and bring back more of Plachta's memories... I need to do my best for Plachta!

EventManagementData.title: Go Buy Vegetables 1
EventManagementData.desc: I need to buy some vegetables from Mrs. Marguerite's store. Plachta seems to be absent minded for some reason... But I'm sure she'll get better if she eats some tasty veggies!

EventManagementData.title: Go Buy Vegetables 2
EventManagementData.desc: It sounds like the crops haven't been very good lately, so I could only buy a few vegetables... I'm a little worried, but... For now, I'll go back to the atelier and make a salad or something.

EventManagementData.title: Find a Way for Everyone to be Happy
EventManagementData.desc: I asked Plachta what she thinks about Luard. She doesn't actually want to kill him... In that case, I need to find a different way, for everyone to be happy.

EventManagementData.title: Make the Item that Started Their Dream
EventManagementData.desc: Apparently they started pursuing the same dream because of a certain item. If we had that, we might be able to persuade Luard to stop... Okay, I need to try making it!

EventManagementData.title: Go Meet Luard
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta remembered where we can find Luard. It's the atelier they used in the past. Maybe... No, Luard is definitely there... I need to go meet him, together with Plachta.

EventManagementData.title: Let's Return to Our Atelier
EventManagementData.desc: Luard turned back into Meklet and Atomina. I'm sure they understood what I had to tell them! ...Anyway! We're all tired, so let's go back to the atelier to rest.

EventManagementData.title: Play Hide and Seek
EventManagementData.desc: I'm going to play hide and seek with Monika and the kids from church... Since I'm playing, I don't want to lose! I need to find everyone before the sun sets!

EventManagementData.title: Go to the Prayer
EventManagementData.desc: I promised Monika that I'd attend prayer with her... It's true that I haven't gone in a long while. They have prayer at the church on weekends. I should try not to forget.

EventManagementData.title: Prepare Sweets
EventManagementData.desc: Monika asked me to make snacks for the concert guests. There isn't much time until the concert, so I need to hurry and deliver them!

EventManagementData.title: Go to the Concert
EventManagementData.desc: Monika's finally having her big debut! I need to go to Mr. Horst's café to listen to her sing! ...Ehehe, I really look forward to this.

EventManagementData.title: Help Oskar 1
EventManagementData.desc: Oskar asked me to help at the grocery store. Then he just ran off somewhere... Well, I accepted it, so I'll do the work properly.

EventManagementData.title: Help Oskar 2
EventManagementData.desc: I finished the work that Oskar asked me to do. Oskar really is hopeless... Anyway, I need to go report to Mrs. Marguerite.

EventManagementData.title: Look for Oskar
EventManagementData.desc: Oskar ditched working at the grocery store and disappeared somewhere. I need to search for him with Monika. Maybe someone saw him...

EventManagementData.title: Save the Vegetables
EventManagementData.desc: It sounds like the vegetables haven't been doing well lately. The reason is lack of nutrients in the soil, and the crops might die at this rate. I need to do something...!

EventManagementData.title: Visit the Plant Habitat 1
EventManagementData.desc: Oskar invited me to visit some habitats for rare plants. The book lists 3 places in total. They might make good alchemy materials... I should go check it out.

EventManagementData.title: Visit the Plant Habitat 2
EventManagementData.desc: I visited all the habitats that Oskar told me about. It was fun seeing so many rare plants. It's probably a good time to head back to town now.

EventManagementData.title: Search for the Eternal Blossom
EventManagementData.desc: Oskar is searching for a plant called the "Eternal Blossom". Apparently it's a rare plant that can't bloom if it's exposed to sunlight. Maybe I should try researching it too...

EventManagementData.title: Search for the Eternal Blossom 1
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta remembered something about the "Eternal Blossom". She said it could still be in the forest north of town. We should go check it out!

EventManagementData.title: Search for the Eternal Blossom 2
EventManagementData.desc: Oskar went running off as soon as we reached the "Forest of Fairies". We can't just leave him alone, so we need to hurry after him!

EventManagementData.title: Go Console Oskar
EventManagementData.desc: Oskar hasn't been very happy ever since that plant lied to him. I'm a little worried, this isn't like him. I should go with Monika to try and console him.

EventManagementData.title: Find the Plant's Intention
EventManagementData.desc: Oskar wants to be friends with plants, even if they lie to him. That's sounds more like him! Let's go and see that plant one more time!

EventManagementData.title: Go Deeper in the Forest
EventManagementData.desc: The plant was lying to protect the other plants deeper in the forest. The "Eternal Blossom" could be there... Let's go further in.

EventManagementData.title: Protect the Eternal Blossom
EventManagementData.desc: We finally found the "Eternal Blossom", but there was a huge monster next to it! The "Eternal Blossom" would be crushed if it was stepped on... We need to save it!

EventManagementData.title: Meet Julio's Friend
EventManagementData.desc: Sir Julio has been investigating alchemy because there's someone he wants to cure. That person is near the town now, so we should go meet them.

EventManagementData.title: Prepare the Medicine
EventManagementData.desc: Nazarus lost control and turned into a monster. I need to Synthesize the medicine that Plachta told me about, and turn him back to normal!

EventManagementData.title: Go Report to Julio
EventManagementData.desc: I made the medicine to cure Nazarus! With this, we should be able to save him... But first, I need to tell Sir Julio!

EventManagementData.title: Hurry to Nazarus
EventManagementData.desc: Sir Julio was really sad that Nazarus lost control, but he came back to his senses... Okay, now we need to go have Nazarus take the medicine!

EventManagementData.title: Search for Nazarus
EventManagementData.desc: The hole Nazarus fell down was connected to what seems to be a mine. Nazarus should be somewhere around here. We need to hurry and find him.

EventManagementData.title: Deliver the Medicine to Nazarus
EventManagementData.desc: Nazarus asked me to make more medicine. He's going to go travel, so he wants it just in case. I should make lots of it, so he could give it to anyone else in need.

EventManagementData.title: Deliver the Puppet Thread
EventManagementData.desc: Fritz asked me to Synthesize string for his puppet shows. I really want to see it too, so I should hurry and deliver it to him in Old Town!

EventManagementData.title: Ask How to Do Maintenance
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta has a doll's body, so she needs regular maintenance. I need to learn how to do it, so she would be fine even if Fritz left town.

EventManagementData.title: Deliver Doll Materials
EventManagementData.desc: Fritz said he came up with an amazing idea for a doll! He asked me to prepare some materials for it. An amazing doll... I wonder what kind of doll it is...

EventManagementData.title: Investigate the "Machine Box"
EventManagementData.desc: Cory received a "Machine Box" that could be a clue to her homeland. We might figure something out if the switch worked... Hmm, who would know about these things...

EventManagementData.title: Deliver Parts
EventManagementData.desc: It sounds like Harol can fix the "Machine Box", but he needs to replace the missing parts... Looks like it's my turn to work hard, for Cory!

EventManagementData.title: Deliver Gunpowder
EventManagementData.desc: Harol asked me to bring gunpowder for his bullets. This is the perfect chance to show him how much I've improved!

EventManagementData.title: Deliver Part Materials
EventManagementData.desc: The clock Harol received from a customer has a defective part. He asked me to find materials to fix it... I'll do my best to find it!

EventManagementData.title: Help Open the Shop
EventManagementData.desc: Leon wants to open a shop, but she doesn't have enough cloth. I really want to see what she has to sell... I should help her out by bringing her some cloth.

EventManagementData.title: Question Leon
EventManagementData.desc: I feel like Leon has been talking behind my back lately... I don't think she's spreading bad rumors or anything, but... I should go ask her!

EventManagementData.title: Give a Present to Leon 1
EventManagementData.desc: Leon doesn't seem very cheerful lately, so I decided to give her an accessory. I need to get to know her better, to make something that suits her...

EventManagementData.title: Give a Present to Leon 2
EventManagementData.desc: After talking to Leon, I know what kinds of things she likes. I should go back to the atelier and think about what to give her.

EventManagementData.title: Give a Present to Leon 3
EventManagementData.desc: I decided to give Leon a brooch as a present. I know exactly what to make now, so I should get started!

EventManagementData.title: Give a Present to Leon 4
EventManagementData.desc: I managed to make Leon's present! I hope this helps her cheer up... Well, there's no sense worrying about it, so I should just go and give it to her!

EventManagementData.title: Go Take a Vacation
EventManagementData.desc: Leon invited us to go on a vacation. Swimming with Leon, huh... Ehehe, this sounds really fun! I should go as soon as I'm ready.

EventManagementData.title: Help Collect Materials
EventManagementData.desc: Logy's so busy at his shop lately that he doesn't even have time to get materials. He's helping me a lot, so... I should find materials for him!

EventManagementData.title: Increase the Furnace's Heat
EventManagementData.desc: Logy asked me to make a device to increase the heat of his furnace. It sounds like it's necessary to forge new weapons. I should try and deliver it as soon as possible!

EventManagementData.title: Deliver Rare Materials
EventManagementData.desc: It sounds like Logy is looking for materials to inspire him, and come up with ideas for his dream weapons. He needs things that aren't seen very much nowadays... I'll search around.

EventManagementData.title: Deliver Materials to Fix the Roof
EventManagementData.desc: It sounds like the church roof has been leaking a lot lately, so Pamela asked me to give her materials to fix it. She just needs wood, so I should deliver it to her.

EventManagementData.title: Investigate Pamela's Age
EventManagementData.desc: ...Exactly how old is Pamela? Uu, now that I think about it, I'm really curious and can't stop... I should ask all kinds of people about it.

EventManagementData.title: Deliver a Bomb to Destroy the Rock
EventManagementData.desc: Tess asked me to make her a bomb, so she can blow up a rock in her yard... I'll make it for her, since she insists, but I wonder if she'll be okay...

EventManagementData.title: Deliver Wood to Fix the House
EventManagementData.desc: After using the bomb I made for her, Tess managed to blow up the rock, but also destroyed her wall... This is kind of my fault, so I should bring her wood to fix the wall...

EventManagementData.title: Deliver Poison to Kill the Weeds
EventManagementData.desc: Tess asked me to make poison for her! She wants to use it to kill the weeds in her yard... I've got a bad feeling about this, but I can't just ignore her request.

EventManagementData.title: Deliver Fertilizer to Revive the Yard
EventManagementData.desc: ...After using the poison, not a single plant will grow in Tess's yard... Looks like I was right. I can't just leave her like this, so I should bring her some fertilizer.

EventManagementData.title: Make Sweet Medicine
EventManagementData.desc: After hearing about how Tess's little brother hates medicine, I thought about making sweet medicine. I should try making it, and take some to Tess.

EventManagementData.title: Deliver Drink Ingredients
EventManagementData.desc: Mr. Horst wants to make a new drink, but he doesn't have enough ingredients. I can't drink alcohol, but... I guess it's okay to help make it.

EventManagementData.title: Reclaim Memories 1
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta's a reference book. That's why writing recipes into her might bring back her memories. I need to think up recipes, then Synthesize them and write them into Plachta.

EventManagementData.title: Reclaim Memories 2
EventManagementData.desc: It looks like writing recipes into Plachta gradually restores her memories. I need to write all kinds of things into her to help her out.

EventManagementData.title: Reclaim Memories 3
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta's purpose is to accumulate knowledge of alchemy. That means what I'm doing now is helping her fulfill that purpose. I'm going to write even more into her!

EventManagementData.title: Reclaim Memories 4
EventManagementData.desc: 500 years... So Plachta's been living for that long... Well, she's a book, so "living" might not be the right word... Anyway, whatever. I just have to keep helping Plachta regain her memories.

EventManagementData.title: Reclaim Memories 5
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta was human in the past, and an alchemist. No wonder she knows so much about alchemy. I might learn some more unexpected things if I keep helping her find her memories...

EventManagementData.title: Reclaim Memories 6
EventManagementData.desc: With her memories returning, I'm learning a lot more about Plachta. I didn't think she was a human girl... I need to keep it up and bring back more of her memories!

EventManagementData.title: Reclaim Memories 7
EventManagementData.desc: Apparently, Plachta was the one who created the "Cauldron of Knowledge"... Does that mean Plachta was some amazing person? That's all the more reason to help her regain her memories!

EventManagementData.title: Reclaim Memories 8
EventManagementData.desc: I transferred Plachta's soul into the doll, so more memories should come back now... I think! Let's try coming up with new recipes and Synthesizing more stuff!

EventManagementData.title: Reclaim Memories 9
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta's memories are returning again, so I need to work even harder now. I'll study lots of alchemy, for Plachta's sake too!

EventManagementData.title: Reclaim Memories 10
EventManagementData.desc: I feel like Plachta's regained a lot of her memories. But we're still a long ways off from getting all of them. I need to work even harder to help her...!

EventManagementData.title: A Doll's Body
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta doesn't have the "sense" of taste, so her tastes differ from mine. Uu, that makes me sad. I wonder if there's anything I can do.

EventManagementData.title: Operation Humanize Redux
EventManagementData.desc: I'll give Plachta a human body. I gave up on it before, but that's the only way for us to enjoy delicious food together! I need to think of a way!

EventManagementData.title: Eyewitness Report 1
EventManagementData.desc: Oskar said he saw Meklet and Atomina at the "Sealed Temple"! I wonder what they're up to. I'm curious, so let's go check!

EventManagementData.title: Eyewitness Report 2
EventManagementData.desc: I arrived at the "Sealed Temple". Oskar seemed really confident about it, so those two must be here somewhere! Let's go search the temple's depths!

EventManagementData.title: Eyewitness Report 3
EventManagementData.desc: I searched every nook and cranny, but I didn't see those two. Maybe Oskar was mistaken. I can't help it, I'll just go back to the atelier.

EventManagementData.title: Continued! Eyewitness 1
EventManagementData.desc: This time Fritz had an eyewitness report! He said he saw Meklet and Atomina at the "Fallen Palace". This time, I'll definitely find them!

EventManagementData.title: Continued! Eyewitness 2
EventManagementData.desc: I've come to the "Fallen Palace"! Apparently, Fritz saw those two a bit further inside. I hope that I at least find some clues.

EventManagementData.title: Continued! Eyewitness 3
EventManagementData.desc: Uu, I found them, but they ran away! As Plachta said, there must be a reason why they ran. I'll go back to the atelier and think about it.

EventManagementData.title: Searching for the Two
EventManagementData.desc: Meklet and Atomina might be searching for something ancient. If I go visit the old buildings around here, I might bump into them!

EventManagementData.title: Found! Meklet & Atomina
EventManagementData.desc: I found Meklet and Atomina! I wonder what business they have at the "Library of All Creation". It looked like they went further in, so I'll follow them!

EventManagementData.title: The Two Attacked
EventManagementData.desc: I found Meklet and Atomina, but they're being attacked by monsters! I know a lot happened between us. But I can't just leave them!

EventManagementData.title: The Two's Circumstances
EventManagementData.desc: Apparently, those two are looking for a way to use alchemy. I'll look for the memos that Plachta used in the past to create the "Cauldron of Knowledge"!

EventManagementData.title: Plachta's Recipe
EventManagementData.desc: I found Plachta's recipe memo at the "Dusk Bookshelf". Now I just have to Synthesize it! I'll make it real quick, and surprise Meklet and Atomina!

EventManagementData.title: Make the Recipe!
EventManagementData.desc: Uu, I Synthesized it according to Plachta's memo, but I failed. According to Plachta, it's not complete. I need to think of ways to complete the recipe!

EventManagementData.title: Recipe, Complete!
EventManagementData.desc: It took some time, but the recipe is complete! It's because Meklet and Atomina taught me. To thank them, I'll Synthesize the "Sage's Emblem"!

EventManagementData.title: Humanizing Difficulties
EventManagementData.desc: I tried thinking of a recipe to give Plachta a human body, but... Where could I find materials like this? I might have to travel far from Kirchen Bell.

EventManagementData.title: Alchemist License Exam?
EventManagementData.desc: Sir Julio told me about an alchemist license exam held in a city called Reisenberg. It's really far from here... But I want to test my skills.

EventManagementData.title: Ask About the Journey
EventManagementData.desc: While traveling for the exam, I'll gather materials for Plachta. It's a good idea, but I'm concerned about the long journey. I should ask various people.

EventManagementData.title: My Answer
EventManagementData.desc: I've made my decision. If grandma went to take the license exam, then I'll go take it too! But I should still talk to Plachta about it first.

EventManagementData.title: Journey Preparations 1
EventManagementData.desc: Plachta supported my decision to go on a journey. In fact, she said she'd follow along! I should think about things we'll need for the trip.

EventManagementData.title: Journey Preparations 2
EventManagementData.desc: I made a list of things I need for the journey. But this is my first time, so I should be extra sure. Fritz is used to travels, so I'll ask him if I'm missing anything!

EventManagementData.title: Bedding is Important!
EventManagementData.desc: Fritz said that a secure place to sleep is the most important thing when traveling. It's true that not being able to sleep would be bad. I'll think about how to make a tent.

EventManagementData.title: My Tent
EventManagementData.desc: I can do Synthesis, and it's really big. I came up with an amazing tent! If I have this, any long journey would be comfortable! I should Synthesize it right away!

EventManagementData.title: Into Distance Into Future
EventManagementData.desc: The tent's done. I can set out on my journey anytime now. What could happen? Who will I meet? I can't even imagine. It'll be a wonderful, mysterious journey!!

EventManagementData.title: Grandma's Clothes
EventManagementData.desc: I've found Grandma's clothes on the bottom of the container! But how did they get there in the first place? ... Anyway, I should see if I can fix them up first!

EventManagementData.title: Origins of the Coat
EventManagementData.desc: Ugh... Monika can be so mean... I did actually grow! I will go and defeat these monsters and prove it to her!

EventManagementData.title: Cory's Request
EventManagementData.desc: Cory asked me to pick some herbs. She always helps me out, so I'm going to look for the best ones to bring her! Oh, and I should change into Grandma's clothes before I go out!

EventManagementData.title: Mending My Ways
EventManagementData.desc: When I'm wearing Grandma's clothes, I should work extra hard to make her proud! First, I will make tools to help me deal with cleaning!

EventManagementData.title: Strengths and Weaknesses
EventManagementData.desc: Oh no... Why did Cory had to bring me a request to deal with ghosts... I can't let her down, so I suppose I have to go, but... I really don't want to...

EventManagementData.title: Secret Ingredient
EventManagementData.desc: Cory and Monika are my dear friends who always support me no matter what. I want to make some delicious sweets to serve at the tea party to show my appreciation!

EventManagementData.title: Doubting Convention (1)
EventManagementData.desc: The secret to improving as an alchemist lies in making things that are considered impossible? ... I see! I'll take Cory's idea and try making an "item that makes more items"!

EventManagementData.title: Doubting Convention (2)
EventManagementData.desc: After talking to Cory, I think I'm ready to make my own duplication tool now. All that is left is to synthesize it!

EventManagementData.title: Final Farewell
EventManagementData.desc: Oh, I almost forgot something very important. I need to make sure I tell Grandma before I leave! Let's go visit Grandma!
